heading: State regulation prohibited
label: 9306 State regulation prohibited
text: A State or political subdivision of a State may not regulate or impose any requirement on pilotage on the Great Lakes.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised sectionSource section (U.S. Code)930646:216gSection 9306 prohibits State or local regulations of pilotage on the Great Lakes and is part of the exception provided by law envisioned under section 8501(a).
